name: Snickerdoodles
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a large bowl of an electric mixer, cream together the butter and softened butter until light.
3. Add the eggs one at a time, beating on low speed until the mixture is smooth.
4. Gradually add the Snickerdoodle Mix, continuing to beat on low speed until the dough begins to form.
5. In a small bowl, combine the sugar and cinnamon.
6. Shape the dough into 1-inch balls.
7. Roll each ball in the cinnamon-sugar blend.
8. Arrange the dough balls on ungreased baking sheets about 2 inches apart.
9. Bake for 16 to 18 minutes, or until lightly browned.
10. Transfer the cookies to wire racks to cool.
